sourceSummary.oneLine: Final inspection test report for Abyz Digital Detector model F1417MCW, detector serial number F1417MCW2501130001.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents supplier product history, mechanical inspection, electrical safety test, performance information, and combination test pass/fail results for a specific detector unit.
keyPoints: Product name is Abyz Digital Detector and model is F1417MCW.
Inspection Date and Date Manufactured are both listed as 1/13/25.
Mechanical, electrical safety, performance, and combination test sections show PASS results.
Combination test includes wired communication, image acquisition, console software functions, and DICOM transmission/output checks.

concepts.name: DICOM Suitability
concepts.evidence: DICOM Suitability, DICOM must be transmitted.

evidence.claim: The source document is a Final Inspection Test Report.
The report identifies H&abyz Co.,Ltd. and form revision A-QI-0-009 (REV.0.3).
The product is Abyz Digital Detector model F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name, Abyz Digital Detector, Model, F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The inspected detector serial number is F1417MCW2501130001.
The inspection date is listed as 1/13/25.
The date manufactured is listed as 1/13/25.
Mechanical inspection results for outline dimensions and weight are marked PASS.
Electrical safety tests are documented, including power input, dielectric strength, protective earth conductor resistance, earth leakage current, touch current, and patient leakage current tests.
evidence.evidenceText: 3. Electrical Safety Test...Power Input Test...Dielectric Strength Test...Protective Earth Conductor Resistance Test...Earth Leakage Current Test...Touch Current Test...Patient Leakage Current Test

evidence.claim: Performance information includes pixel defect, line defect, MTF, and DQE tests with PASS results.
The report states that the performance information test method follows the test method of the test standard.
evidence.evidenceText: The performance information test method follows the test method of the test standard.

evidence.claim: Combination testing requires power ON/OFF, wired communication, image acquisition, console software functions, and DICOM checks, all marked PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: 5. Combination Test...Check power ON/OFF...PASS...wired communication...PASS...Image must be acquired...PASS...Console Software...PASS...DICOM Suitability...PASS

evidence.claim: DICOM suitability checks include DICOM transmission and DICOM output.
evidence.evidenceText: DICOM Suitability,DICOM must be transmitted...It should be DICOM output.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
No named regulatory standard is cited; the source only refers generally to the test standard and includes DICOM checks.
The document date is interpreted from the inspection date 1/13/25; the source path contains 2025.01.14 but the report body lists 1/13/25.
